name: ScamStop
description: Real-time scam detection powered by AI. Protects you from scams on Facebook, Instagram, Gmail, Telegram, and more.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; object-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https://scamstop-api.onrender.com https://firestore.googleapis.com https://firebase.googleapis.com http://ip-api.com https://nominatim.openstreetmap.org https://upload.uploadcare.com https://api.uploadcare.com
